_note: Consolidated enemy database. Single source of truth for enemy stats, abilities, drop tables, resources, and cosmetics.

Ferrite.description: A dense, compressed iron-based ore found throughout Earth and Mercury. Ferrite is one of the most common crafting materials in the Origin System — the backbone of Grineer industrial manufacturing.
Ferrite.tb_use: General crafting material. Accumulated from Grineer drop tables. Used in future Warframe and weapon blueprint crafting.

Rubedo.description: A blood-red crystalline mineral found on Phobos, Earth, Sedna, Europa, and the Void. Rubedo's unique electromagnetic properties make it invaluable in advanced component construction.
Rubedo.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for intermediate and advanced weapon/Warframe blueprints. Rarer than Ferrite — stockpile carefully.

Neurodes.description: Rare biological nodes recovered from Infested-contaminated organisms. Neurodes contain dense neural tissue that interfaces with Orokin-era technology — indispensable for high-tier crafting.
Neurodes.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Essential for Warframe Neuroptics and high-level weapon components. Extremely valuable — do not sell.

Detonite Ampule.description: Pressurized containers of Grineer-manufactured explosive compound. Originally used in Grineer demolition charges and missile warheads, these ampules are repurposed by the Tenno for component synthesis.
Detonite Ampule.source: Grineer enemies, Grineer Caches, Invasion rewards
Detonite Ampule.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Used in Grineer-tier weapon blueprints and some Warframe components. Keep a reserve for future crafting.

Endo.description: Concentrated Orokin bio-matter used exclusively to rank up Mods. Endo is extracted from enemy neural pathways and combat data crystals. There is no substitute for Endo in the Mod leveling process.
Endo.source: Universal drop — enemies, missions, Transmutation, Arbitrations
Endo.tb_use: Used to rank up Mods from 0 to their maximum rank. Higher mod ranks require exponentially more Endo. A mod at rank 10 costs 8,145 total Endo to fully upgrade.

Alloy Plate.description: Dense sheets of compressed Grineer alloy, harvested from manufacturing facilities across Venus, Jupiter, and Sedna. One of the most common structural materials in the Origin System.
Alloy Plate.source: Venus, Jupiter, Sedna, Ceres, Phobos, Pluto
Alloy Plate.tb_use: Common crafting material. Used in a wide range of Warframe and weapon blueprints. Farm freely — you will always need more.

Salvage.description: Scavenged scrap metal and mechanical components recovered from Grineer and Corpus wreckage. Salvage is abundant on Mars and Jupiter, where battlefield detritus is plentiful.
Salvage.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required in large quantities for many weapon blueprints. Stockpile from Grineer-heavy missions.

Polymer Bundle.description: Flexible synthetic polymer filaments produced by Corpus manufacturing plants on Venus and Uranus. Used in insulation, circuitry housings, and structural reinforcement.
Polymer Bundle.tb_use: Common crafting material. Used extensively in Warframe components and most primary weapons. Farm on Venus or Mercury.

Circuits.description: Integrated circuit boards salvaged from Corpus electronics and Grineer communication arrays. Found in abundance on Venus and Ceres.
Circuits.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required for Saryn, Banshee, Valkyr components and several weapons. Farm on Venus.

Nano Spores.description: Microscopic Infested spores shed by Infested organisms on Saturn, Neptune, and Eris. Despite their biological origin they are widely used as a binding agent in Tenno manufacturing.
Nano Spores.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required for Paris, Furax, Ignis, Kronen, and Hydroid components. Farm on Saturn.

Plastids.description: Organic polymer secreted by Infested organisms and harvested for use as a flexible building material. Found on Saturn, Phobos, Pluto, and Eris.
Plastids.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Used in nearly every Warframe Systems blueprint and many weapons. Prioritise farming.

Oxium.description: Ultra-light structural compound produced by Corpus Oxium Osprey drones. Notoriously difficult to farm — Ospreys must be killed before they self-destruct.
Oxium.source: Corpus Oxium Ospreys (Europa, Io, Outer Terminus)
Oxium.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for certain Corpus-themed blueprints. Kill Ospreys quickly to prevent destruction.

Neural Sensors.description: Exotic neural interface components recovered from Corpus Sapping Ospreys and high-value targets on Jupiter. These densely packed micro-processors bridge organic and synthetic intelligence.
Neural Sensors.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Used in Warframe Neuroptics across most frames and in Tipedo. Do not sell — always in demand.

Control Module.description: Advanced Orokin-era control hardware recovered from Void caches and high-level Corpus units on Neptune. These modules manage the complex feedback systems inside Warframe suits.
Control Module.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Warframe Systems blueprints. Farm Neptune missions or Void Exterminate.

Morphics.description: Malleable Orokin-era material that shifts between solid and semi-liquid states under electromagnetic stress. Found throughout Mercury, Mars, Europa, and Pluto.
Morphics.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required in nearly every Warframe Chassis blueprint and many weapon recipes. Farm Mercury or Mars.

Orokin Cell.description: Ancient Orokin power cells containing a near-inexhaustible energy source. Recovered from Orokin Derelicts, Orokin Towers, and powerful bosses across the Origin System.
Orokin Cell.source: Saturn (Tethys), Ceres (Seimeni), Orokin Derelicts, Boss drops
Orokin Cell.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required to assemble every Warframe main blueprint. Critically important — never sell. Farm Saturn or Ceres.

Gallium.description: A rare metallic element with an extremely low melting point. Gallium pools in cavities of Grineer-occupied terrain on Mars and Uranus, where it is harvested for its heat-transfer properties.
Gallium.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Rhino (main blueprint), Oberon, Hydroid Systems, Fragor, Galatine, and Akstiletto. Farm Mars.

Argon Crystal.description: A crystalline energy matrix found only within Orokin Void fissures. Argon Crystals decay at a rate of 50% per day — use them immediately after acquisition.
Argon Crystal.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for Hydroid Neuroptics/Chassis, Kronen, and Atterax. DECAYS — only farm when you are ready to craft.

Detonite Injector.description: A pressurised injector loaded with refined Detonite compound. Produced by processing raw Detonite Ampules in the Foundry. Essential for Grineer-tier incendiary weapons.
Detonite Injector.source: Craft from Detonite Ampules ×10 + Ferrite×400 + Plastids×150 + Polymer Bundle×500
Detonite Injector.tb_use: Rare craftable component. Required ×2 for Ignis. Must be crafted in the Foundry before use — cannot be farmed directly.

Forma.description: A powerful Orokin catalyst that restructures a weapon or Warframe's polarities, allowing more mod capacity. Forma blueprints drop from Void missions and Nightwave rewards.
Forma.source: Void missions, Nightwave rewards, Sortie rewards
Forma.tb_use: Legendary craftable component. Required for Ignis and Akstiletto. Very rare — only craft these weapons when you have Forma to spare.

Sand Yellow Pigment.description: A fine ochre pigment extracted from Grineer desert-pattern camo compounds. Tenno colourists prize this hue for replicating the dusty tones of Phobos and Mars surface units.
Sand Yellow Pigment.tb_use: Cosmetic material. Used in Colour Pack crafting at the Orbiter. Accumulate pigments to unlock new palette entries for your Warframe and weapons.

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Unleashes a tight burst from his Grakata — reliable, consistent damage.

abilities.name: Suppressive Fire
abilities.description: Sustained raking fire that can stagger and knock the target to the ground.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: A brutal horizontal chop with his Cleaver — guaranteed Slash proc.

abilities.name: Overhead Smash
abilities.description: A two-handed overhead blow. Heavy damage; good chance of Knockdown.

abilities.name: Shotgun Blast
abilities.description: Close-range shotgun attack — high Impact damage.

abilities.name: Grapple Hook
abilities.description: Launches a hook that pulls the target in and deals Slash damage.

frontier_lancer.name: Frontier Lancer
frontier_lancer._wiki: Frontier Lancer — Earth, Grineer Forest tileset. HP=100, Armor=100 (Alloy Armor). Equips Grakata (NOT Karak — Karak is the Elite Frontier Lancer). Sheev dagger as backup. Source: warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Lancer/Frontier_Lancer

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Rapid Grakata fire — moderate Impact damage per burst.

abilities.name: Suppressive Volley
abilities.description: Sustained Grakata fire that staggers and knocks the target down.

frontier_trooper.name: Frontier Trooper
frontier_trooper._wiki: Frontier Grineer Trooper — Earth variant. HP=150, Armor=150. Equips Sobek automatic shotgun (8 pellets per shot, high spread). Close-quarters specialist. Can knock enemies down with shotgun blast.

abilities.name: Sobek Blast
abilities.description: Close-range Sobek shotgun blast — heavy Impact damage at close quarters.

abilities.name: Point-Blank Volley
abilities.description: Empties both barrels at point-blank range. High damage, good knockdown chance.

frontier_heavy_gunner.name: Frontier Heavy Gunner
frontier_heavy_gunner._wiki: Frontier Heavy Gunner — Earth, Grineer Forest tileset. HP=350, Armor=500, base_level=1, Affinity=500. Equips Gorgon minigun. Deals mostly Slash damage. Radial knockdown when player is too close. Source: wiki.warframe.com/w/Heavy_Gunner

abilities.name: Gorgon Minigun
abilities.description: Sustained Gorgon minigun fire — relentless Impact damage that eats through shields.

abilities.name: Charged Burst
abilities.description: Winds up for a devastating concentrated burst. High damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Armor Lock
abilities.description: Activates battle-armor protocol — restores shields when critically low.

grineer_warden.name: Grineer Warden
grineer_warden._wiki: Grineer Warden — found in Rescue missions on Earth (Mariana node in Vor's Prize). HP=600, Armor=500 per wiki; scaled to 400/400 for bot balance. Heavy melee enforcer carrying Heliocor mace and Grakata. Guards hostages in prison blocks.

abilities.name: Heliocor Strike
abilities.description: Brutal mace swing with the Heliocor — heavy Impact damage and knockdown chance.

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Backup Grakata fire when at range — steady Impact damage.

abilities.name: Warden Protocol
abilities.description: Activates hardened riot-armor reserves when critically damaged.

captain_vor.name: Captain Vor
captain_vor._wiki: Captain Vor — Grineer boss, Vor's Prize final encounter at Cambria, Earth. Wiki stats: HP=1994, Shields=1742, Armor=308 (spawn level 10). Scaled to HP=800/Shields=600/Armor=300 for bot balance. Weapons: Seer pistol, Janus Key (Void beam), Cronus sword. Abilities: Sphere Shield (invulnerability + reinforcements at 75%/50%/25% HP), Nervos Mine (stun), Teleport.

abilities.name: Seer Shot
abilities.description: Precise shot from Vor's custom Seer pistol — reliable Impact damage.

abilities.name: Janus Key Beam
abilities.description: A beam of concentrated Void energy from the Janus Key — Radiation damage causes confusion.

abilities.name: Nervos Mine
abilities.description: Vor hurls an electrified Nervos grenade — Electricity damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Cronus Strike
abilities.description: Vor closes the gap with his Cronus sword — Slash damage with a bleed proc.
